news.summary: IQSTEL Inc., a prominent multinational telecommunications and technology firm traded on NASDAQ under the symbol IQST, disclosed today that they have recorded around $77.8 million in preliminary net revenue for the initial four months of 2025 (January to April).
news.headline: IQSTEL Inc. reports $77.8 million revenue in 4 months; on track for $400M annually.

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, intoPIX has introduced the Titanium Software Suite tailored for cutting-edge IPMX and SMPTE 2110 software-based workflows. The rise in adoption of IP among AV professionals has led to a surge in the need for dependable, high-performing solutions that offer low latency, exceptional quality, and smooth interoperability. Responding to these requirements, intoPIX has unveiled a comprehensive and adjustable toolkit catering to the needs of professional users, integrators, and AV system designers. This suite is ideal for crafting setups for live events, corporate AV networks, and more.
news.headline: intoPIX introduces new Titanium Software Suite for AV-over-IP workflows, offering speed, quality & interoperability.

news.summary: Crescita Therapeutics Inc., a Canadian commercial dermatology company, disclosed the outcomes of its Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders held in Laval, Quebec. The meeting, convened on June 4, 2025, and attended by shareholders, saw the election of directors. The appointed Directors Nominees received a detailed breakdown of votes via proxy. Crescita is publicly traded under the symbols TSX: CTX and OTC US: CRRTF.
news.headline: Crescita Therapeutics reports Annual Meeting results; held in Quebec on June 4, 2025. Voting details in.

news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden on June 5, 2025, Heliospectra AB (publ) disclosed the induction of Denis Dullemans as Lead Global Greenhouse Sales in their management team. Heliospectra AB is renowned worldwide for its smart lighting solutions tailored for optimized plant growth environments.
news.headline: Heliospectra names Denis Dullemans as Lead Global Greenhouse Sales to strengthen management team.

news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) has experienced a notable correction after hitting an all-time high of $111,880, the first significant drop in nearly two months. This decline is attributed to growing macroeconomic uncertainty and excessive leverage in derivatives markets. The pullback is a crucial moment for investors, as increased selling pressure, profit-taking, and heightened options activity indicate a period of heightened volatility. The correction is linked to escalating macroeconomic risks and aggressive positions in the derivatives market. A key factor was a surprising legal ruling in the US that temporarily paused a decision on government tariffs, leading to a spike in 30-year Treasury yields exceeding 5% and triggering a widespread sell-off in various assets, including cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin.
news.headline: Bitcoin experiencing correction from all-time high of $111,880; rising macroeconomic uncertainty and derivatives market leverage at play.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, Biomerica, Inc. (Nasdaq: BMRA) based in Irvine, California, a distinguished player in advanced diagnostic treatments, shared that findings from its critical clinical examination assessing the effectiveness of the inFoods ® IBS test in aiding individuals with Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS) have been released in the June 2025 edition of Gastroenterology. This esteemed journal, the official publication of the American Gastroenterological Association and a top-tier platform in the GI sector, featured the data from this trial.
news.headline: Biomerica's IBS study results published in Gastroenterology June issue, major milestone for inFoods ® test.

news.summary: Aditxt, Inc., a social innovation platform in Mountain View, California, with the Nasdaq ticker symbol ADTX, revealed that CEO Amro Albanna will host the upcoming Aditxt Weekly Update along with Dr. Friedrich Kapp, Chris Mitton, and Evofem Biosciences' CEO Saundra Pelletier. The discussion, scheduled for Friday, June 6, 2025, will focus on advancements in immune therapy, early disease detection, and women's health. The event details include the title "Aditxt Weekly Update" and the specific time of the session.
news.headline: Aditxt hosts event with noted industry leaders to discuss immune therapy, disease detection, and women's health.

news.summary: Cologne, Germany and Chicago - Cleverbridge has been awarded three grants by the German government totaling up to €8 million. The grants aim to boost innovation in AI-powered worldwide ecommerce for the company.
news.headline: Cleverbridge gets €8 million in government grants for AI-driven global ecommerce innovation.

news.summary: Airia, based in Atlanta, has revealed enhanced backing for the A2A protocol, along with the introduction of advanced security and governance features for MCP.
news.headline: Airia enhances A2A protocol support and introduces enterprise-level security for MCP, improving data protection.

news.summary: Based in Tacoma, Washington, TrueBlue (NYSE: TBI), a top provider of specialized workforce solutions, has received recognition from Forbes for two of its staffing brands, PeopleReady and Staff Management | SMX. Both have been included on Forbes’ list of America’s Best Temporary Staffing Firms. This acknowledgment showcases the extensive reach and influence of TrueBlue’s varied staffing services, spanning on-demand, skilled, and onsite workforce solutions. The company's achievement on this list underscores its commitment to delivering high-quality staffing solutions.
news.headline: TrueBlue's PeopleReady and Staff Management | SMX brands ranked on Forbes' Best Temporary Staffing Firms list, reflecting TrueBlue's diversified workforce solutions.

news.summary: Kardinia Energy, an Australian company known for its fully recyclable printed solar technology, recently made its debut in North America at Coldplay's Music of the Spheres World Tour shows in Stanford Stadium, CA on May 31 and June 1. This event marked one of the significant deployments of mobile, recyclable solar panels at a live concert in the US. The company's innovative technology is setting a new sustainability standard for the entertainment industry with a notable impact on environmental preservation.
news.headline: Kardinia Energy debuts recyclable printed solar at Coldplay concert in Stanford Stadium, setting new sustainability standard in entertainment with large-scale deployment.

news.summary: Konexial, a key player in supply chain, logistics, and fleet solutions based in Knoxville, Tennessee, has confirmed their ongoing commitment to Caliber's 2025 Annual Food Drive. The initiative is dedicated to distributing more than 6 million meals to families across the country.
news.headline: Konexial & Caliber team up for 2025 Food Drive, targeting 6 million meals nationwide for families. #supplychain #logistics.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Boston, Second Avenue Capital Partners (SACP), the specialty finance affiliate of SB360 Holdings, revealed a leadership shift with the retirement of Chris O'Connor, President of SACP, as of May 31, 2025. Chris played a pivotal role in the firm's achievements and...
news.headline: Second Avenue Capital Partners (SACP) announces leadership transition as President Chris O'Connor retires on May 31, 2025.

news.summary: Today, Prose, a prominent company specializing in personalized beauty products, has announced the opening of a new customization facility in the Los Angeles region. This strategic move comes in response to increasing consumer interest and signifies the company's initial venture beyond its headquarters in New York. This expansion signifies a significant milestone for Prose as it aims to cater to a larger consumer base. The facility is expected to accelerate production to meet the rising demand, consolidating Prose's position as a leader in the global beauty personalization market.
news.headline: Prose opens new customization center in LA to meet rising consumer demand, its first expansion outside NY.

news.summary: A company is expecting to generate millions in new revenues by the year 2025. Their modular nano-grid system is capable of delivering over 4,000 watt-hours of energy generated by solar power. The system is aimed at various markets including vehicles, job sites, the military, and portable power applications.
news.headline: Worksport to launch SOLIS & COR Nano-Grid System in Fall 2025, expecting millions in new revenues. System delivers 4,000Wh+ of solar energy for various markets.

news.summary: In Lima, Peru on June 5, 2025, the Republic of Peru made public the initiation of offers to exchange some of its existing sovereign bonds, known as bonos soberanos, which include Global Depositary bonos soberanos.
news.headline: Peru to exchange existing sovereign bonds and issue new bonds; offers started on June 5, 2025.

news.summary: The findings from a recent survey reveal that over 75% of younger DIY enthusiasts are optimistic about finishing their projects in 2025. Among the top priorities are bathroom renovations such as bathtub or shower replacements, indoor painting, and installing built-in storage solutions. Additionally, more than 50% of those surveyed expressed a desire to tackle various DIY tasks.
news.headline: New survey finds over 75% of younger DIYers confident in completing projects in 2025. Top projects include bath/shower, painting, & storage/org.
